input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.4.1
            TITLE: teams must do one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.4.1: Teams must do one of:
F.8.4.1 Teams must do one of: 
• Use an approved Standard Impact Attenuator from the FSAE Online Website  
• Build and test a Custom Impact Attenuator of their own design F.8.8

final_answer: Teams must do one of: • Use an approved Standard Impact Attenuator from the FSAE Online Website • Build and test a Custom Impact Attenuator of their own design
